## • Fixed a bug where a new user couldn't confirm that he is a human!
## • Reworked `history` command! Filter by rare and sort by rare are now supported! Improved editing history! Cooldown has been increased from 1 minute to 5 minutes!
## • Deleted `edithistory` command! Instead, `addhistory` command is added!
## • Fixed invalid prediction bug in challenge commands!
## • Changed color of the luck-related commands!
## • Updated separator image in history and challenge commands!
